description_long: This is a straight, narrow ladder constructed from dark-colored metal, featuring two parallel side rails and four evenly spaced horizontal rungs. The ladder has a minimalist, utilitarian design with no visible embellishments or safety features. The rungs are flat and appear to be welded or securely attached to the side rails, providing stable footholds. The side rails have a rectangular profile, giving the ladder a sturdy and industrial appearance. The finish is matte, with a slightly rough texture that suggests good grip for climbing. This ladder is suitable for use in urban environments such as garages, maintenance areas, or for accessing elevated platforms.
description: A dark metal ladder with four flat rungs and rectangular side rails, designed for sturdy, utilitarian use in urban settings. The finish is matte and slightly rough for grip.
description_view_0: A narrow edge-on view showing the thin profile of the ladder, with the rungs not visible.
description_view_1: A frontal view displaying the full length of the ladder, with four evenly spaced rungs and rectangular side rails.
description_view_2: Another edge-on view, identical to view 0, showing only the slim side of the ladder.
description_view_3: A second frontal view, identical to view 1, clearly showing the four rungs and the ladder's overall structure.
